ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clustering_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering algorithm */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the clustering method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters required for the algorithm */,
  "scalability" TEXT /* Scalability constraints of the algorithm */,
  "use_case" TEXT /* Typical use cases for the algorithm */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometry metric used for clustering */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the algorithm */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting record */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering algorithm used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for clustering */,
  "parameter_values" TEXT /* Values of the parameters used during the algorithm run */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the algorithm was executed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the algorithm run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES clustering_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_settings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm settings used */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken for the algorithm to execute in seconds */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the clustering results */,
  "clusters_created" INTEGER /* Number of clusters created by the algorithm */,
  "silhouette_score" REAL /* Silhouette score of the clusters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES algorithm_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster result */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm settings used */,
  "clusters" TEXT /* Details of the clusters created */,
  "output_file" TEXT /* File path to the output results */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Visualization of the clusters (e.g., graph, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_results_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES algorithm_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clustering_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the session */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in_progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clustering_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clustering_sessions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter template */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering algorithm the template is for */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter template */,
  "parameter_values" TEXT /* Parameter values defined in the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_templates_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES clustering_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the clustering project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
